API docs by Redocly

AIAS (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

AIAS — Adaptive Intelligent Audit System

Multi-tenant audit management API built on Laravel 13 with Passport OAuth2 authentication.

Authentication

All protected endpoints require a Bearer token obtained via POST /auth/login. Include it in the Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer <token>.

Multi-Tenancy

Tenant-scoped endpoints automatically resolve the tenant context from the authenticated user's tenant_id. No explicit tenant parameter is required in request bodies.

Response Envelope

All responses follow a consistent envelope:

{ "data": { ... }, "meta": { "request_id": "...", "version": "v1", "tenant": "..." } }

Pagination

List endpoints accept page and per_page query parameters.

Audits

audit.index

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer
Default: 1
per_page
integer
Default: 15
sort_by
string

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/audits

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
"string"

audit.store

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string <= 255 characters
checklist_id
integer or null
task_type_id
integer or null
scope
string or null
Enum: "internal" "external" "service_provider" "supplier"
department_id
integer or null
audit_start_date
required
string <date-time>
audit_end_date
string or null <date-time>
lead_auditor_id
integer or null
quality_manager_id
integer or null
add_appendix
boolean or null
description
string or null
is_featured
boolean or null

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/audits

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "checklist_id": 0,
  • "task_type_id": 0,
  • "scope": "internal",
  • "department_id": 0,
  • "audit_start_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "audit_end_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "lead_auditor_id": 0,
  • "quality_manager_id": 0,
  • "add_appendix": true,
  • "description": "string",
  • "is_featured": true
}

Companies

company.index

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer
Default: 1
per_page
integer
Default: 15
sort_by
string

Responses

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
"string"

company.store

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
name
required
string <= 255 characters
address
string or null
office_location
string or null <= 255 characters
latitude
number or null [ -90 .. 90 ]
longitude
number or null [ -180 .. 180 ]
postal_code
string or null <= 20 characters
country_id
integer or null
level_of_operations
string (LevelOfOperations)
Enum: "local" "regional" "international"
trading_name
string or null <= 255 characters
website
string or null <uri> <= 255 characters
email
string or null <email> <= 255 characters
phone
string or null <= 30 characters
logo
string or null <binary> <application/octet-stream> <= 2048 characters
description
string or null
is_active
boolean or null
is_featured
boolean or null
Array of objects or null

Responses

integer

currency
string or null <= 5 characters
currency_name
string or null <= 50 characters
currency_sign
string or null <= 5 characters
country_code
string or null <= 10 characters
phone_digits
integer or null [ 1 .. 15 ]
status
boolean or null

Multi-Factor Authentication

POST /v1/auth/mfa/verify Verify an MFA code during a pending login session. Issues a full Passport access token on success

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
mfa_token
required
string <uuid>
code
required
string

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/auth/mfa/verify

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "mfa_token": "788fc5df-6aa0-4b8c-8e1f-f6130520e4d5",
  • "code": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": "string",
  • "meta": {
    • "request_id": "string",
    • "version": "string",
    • "tenant": "string"
    }
}

GET /v1/mfa/status Return the current MFA status for the authenticated user

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/mfa/status

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": "string",
  • "meta": {
    • "request_id": "string",
    • "version": "string",
    • "tenant": "string"
    }
}

POST /v1/mfa/setup Generate a TOTP secret and QR code for the authenticated user. The user must confirm with a valid code before MFA is activated

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/mfa/setup

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": "string",
  • "meta": {
    • "request_id": "string",
    • "version": "string",
    • "tenant": "string"
    }
}

POST /v1/mfa/confirm Confirm MFA setup by verifying the first TOTP code. Activates MFA and returns one-time backup codes

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
secret
required
string

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/mfa/confirm

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "secret": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 409
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": "string",
  • "meta": {
    • "request_id": "string",
    • "version": "string",
    • "tenant": "string"
    }
}

POST /v1/mfa/disable Disable MFA after verifying the current password and a valid MFA code

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
password
required
string

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/mfa/disable

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "password": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": "string",
  • "meta": {
    • "request_id": "string",
    • "version": "string",
    • "tenant": "string"
    }
}

POST /v1/mfa/backup-codes Regenerate backup codes after verifying a valid TOTP code

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/mfa/backup-codes

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": "string",
  • "meta": {
    • "request_id": "string",
    • "version": "string",
    • "tenant": "string"
    }
}

PUT /v1/mfa/method Update the preferred MFA method

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
method
required
string (MfaMethod)
Enum: "totp" "email"

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/mfa/method

application/json

id
required

string <= 100 characters

string <= 100 characters

required
string <email> <= 255 characters

string or null <= 10 characters
phone
string or null <= 30 characters
password

string
preferred_timezone
string or null <= 100 characters
office_location
string or null <= 255 characters

string or null <= 500 characters

string or null
is_active
boolean or null

required
string

Users

user.index

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer
Default: 1
per_page
integer
Default: 15
sort_by
string

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/users

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
"string"

Register a new central user with the tenant role

This is Step 1 of the tenant provisioning flow. The created user is stored on the central database and can be referenced as the owner when creating a new Tenant (Step 2).

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
string or null <= 50 characters
first_name
required
string <= 100 characters
middle_name
string or null <= 100 characters
last_name
required
string <= 100 characters
username
required
string <= 100 characters
email
required
string <email> <= 255 characters
country_code
string or null <= 10 characters
phone
string or null <= 30 characters
password
required
string
preferred_timezone
string or null <= 100 characters
office_location
string or null <= 255 characters
avatar
string or null <= 500 characters
notes
string or null
is_active
boolean or null

Responses

http://localhost:8020/api/v1/users

  • Payload

application/json

  • "title": "string",
